creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Comment on attachment 236846
Patch for mongodb60

I think this patch is good.
One minor thing. This line is not needed and broke my build with llvm-ar because I had an incompatible LDFLAGS set.

+		LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"

So apart from that line we should commit this version of the patch IMHO.
Just to be sure: the whole files/aarch64 directory can be removed.
